connecting Deploy a grid
Autonomous cloud operations

The grid that runs itself.

AgentOS deploys four autonomous agents across a global storage grid. They provision capacity, audit encryption, watch every node, and commit each action to a tamper-proof hash chain — in real time, with no one at the wheel.

Watch the grid live → How it works

202 accepted — StorageAgent attached provisioning policy

encrypted-fast

Live topology

A grid you can watch think.

Every node below is a real storage node served by the AgentOS backend. Agents ping nodes, route packets between regions, and commit transactions — the moment it happens here, it happens on the wire.

storage gateway live packet
grid load —
capacity —
p99 latency 12 ms
throughput — Mbps
Storage
Security
Monitor
Ops
Technology

Engineered for production scale.

Encrypted end to end

Every byte is sealed with AES-256-GCM before it touches disk. Keys rotate automatically every 72 hours with zero-downtime handoff.

Multi-region residency

Pin pools to specific geographies. AgentOS enforces residency at the control plane — your data never leaves the jurisdictions you choose.

Provisioned throughput

Guaranteed IOPS and bandwidth per pool. No noisy neighbours — each pool gets reserved capacity with 50% burst headroom.

Tamper-proof ledger

Every read, write, and permission change is hash-chained into an append-only ledger. Break one link and the whole chain rejects it.

The operators

Four agents. One autonomous grid.

◈

StorageAgent

Provisions pools, allocates blocks, rebalances capacity across regions.

⬡

SecurityAgent

Audits encryption, runs threat scans, enforces residency policy.

◎

MonitorAgent

Tracks node health, latency, and throughput; raises alerts on drift.

▰

OpsAgent

Bridges the CLI, executes transactions, and seals them into the ledger.

Live operations

The event stream, unfiltered.

Plans

One pricing model. No surprises.

  • 10 GiB encrypted storage
  • 1 region
  • Community support

Production

  • Up to 500 TiB

Custom
  • Unlimited capacity
  • Any region, any topology
